programme.desc: The bargain hunters roll into Tustin, Calif., fellow bidders make things difficult for Jarrod and Brandi; Jeff makes record profit on a low-price locker; Barry and Kenny try to sideswipe Dave.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Officers in Indiana chase a car full of women; in Illinois, police investigate a man who has allegedly taken dangerous drugs; in California, a suspected gang member barricades himself inside his car as police attempt to get him out.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In El Paso, police engage in a struggle with a suspect who reportedly attempts to flee; in Mission, officers respond to a serious car accident; in Greene County, a man believed to be an escaped convict leads police on a wild pursuit.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 leads the charge after a Greene County pursuit; in Warwick, a homeowner's security footage captures a suspected crime in progress; in El Paso, officers respond to a tipsy visitor knocking on neighborhood doors.
